query:
-- Verificar corretores presentes e elegibilidade
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.status,
  u.role,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as leads_trabalhados,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(l.id), 0) * 100, 1) as taxa_trabalho_pct,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(l.id) < 40 THEN 'elegivel_carga_inicial'
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN l.status != 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(l.id), 0) >= 0.9 THEN 'elegivel_taxa_trabalho'
    ELSE 'nao_elegivel'
  END as elegibilidade
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'corretor' AND u.status = 'presente'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.status, u.role
ORDER BY total_leads ASC
LIMIT 20;
